# Repository-Specific Copilot Instructions

Replace the placeholders below with project truth.

- Read the primary architecture and onboarding docs before making structural changes.
- Prefer the existing project scripts and task runners over ad hoc commands.
- Reuse established abstractions before adding new ones.
- Keep changes minimal unless the task explicitly calls for broader refactoring.
- Before claiming completion, run the narrowest meaningful validation command and report what was verified.
- When a task affects behavior, mention the critical files and any remaining risks.
